name: blueprints-codex
description: Repo-local Codex skills and guardrails for 3d_in_blueprints.

interface.longDescription: Codex plugin for 3d_in_blueprints bootstrap, orchestration, quality gates, active Blender add-on/backend work, and dormant Windows executable profile.
defaultPrompt: Use $blueprints-audit-orchestrator for broad audits, skills, hooks, agents, and instruction changes.
Use $blueprints-windows-exe-profile only when the current request activates Windows executable planning.
Use $blueprints-blender-addon-profile for Blender add-on, backend bridge, background Blender test, or add-on packaging work.
